---
title: "Georgiana Mary Rogers, Lady Blachford"
---

## Georgiana Mary Rogers, Lady Blachford

**Dates:** (d. 1900)

**Maiden name:** (Colvile)

### Description

Known as ‘Gingy Colvile’ she was first cousin of Jemima Blackburn, and sister of Margaret Agnes (Colvile) Paul.

### Biography

She married (1848) Frederic Rogers, who became Sir Frederic Rogers in 1851 and 1st Lord Blachford in 1871. [Fairley, <i>Jemima</i>,  128]

### Letters

- Letter from December 14 1895
- Letter from Decr 29th [1894]
- Letter from Dec 1st [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
